title: GGSIPU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Research Assistant Posts
description: The Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University (GGSIPU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Research Assistant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech can apply for the GGSIPU Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selecti...
